Defines a library map for registering linter classes in the Pebble firmware codebase.

# Purpose
The file is a PHP script that registers a library map for a software project. It uses the `phutil_register_library_map` function to define the structure and components of the library. The map includes a `__library_version__` key set to `2`, indicating the version of the library. The `class` array maps class names to their respective file paths, specifically `PebbleCpplintLinter` and `PebbleCppcheckLinter`, which are located in the `cpplint` and `cppcheck` directories, respectively. The `xmap` array establishes a relationship between these classes and the `ArcanistExternalLinter` class, indicating that both linters extend or implement this base class. The file is automatically generated and can be rebuilt using the 'arc liberate' command.
